Good morning, Erica! What time do you usually wake up?
I usually wake up at six o'clock. And you, David?
I always wake up early, at five thirty. Then I have breakfast. Do you have breakfast at home?
Yes, I always have breakfast at home. I often drink coffee.
Nice! What do you do in the evening?
I sometimes cook dinner, and I never go to bed late.
That is a good routine. I usually go to bed at eleven o'clock.
My routine is calm. I like my mornings.
I always wake up at six o'clock.
I usually have breakfast at home.
I sometimes cook dinner.
I never go to bed late.
This is my daily routine.

Hi, this is Camila. Let me tell you about my normal day. I always wake up at six o'clock in the morning. I usually take a shower, and then I have breakfast. I often drink coffee with my breakfast. I go to work at eight o'clock. I usually have lunch at noon with my friends. In the evening, I sometimes cook dinner at home, but I sometimes eat at a restaurant. I never go to bed late, because I am always tired at night. This is my simple routine. Have a nice day!

Hello, my name is Paulo. I want to tell you about my daily routine. I usually wake up early, at six thirty. I always have a big breakfast, because I am very hungry in the morning. I often go to the gym before work. I usually have lunch at one o'clock. In the afternoon, I sometimes drink tea. I never work after seven o'clock in the evening. I always have dinner with my family. I usually go to bed at eleven o'clock. I like my routine, because it is calm and simple.
First, say when you wake up. Second, talk about your breakfast. Third, talk about your lunch. Fourth, talk about your dinner. Fifth, say when you go to bed.
